details.message: Ensure your TOS notify the CRISP usage

headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; frame-src 'self' https://game.crisp.chat https://datasubvention.crisp.help; worker-src blob:; connect-src 'self' https://api-datasubvention-preprod.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo.io https://client.crisp.chat wss://client.relay.crisp.chat https://storage.crisp.chat wss://stream.relay.crisp.chat https://stats.beta.gouv.fr/ https://geo.api.gouv.fr https://sentry.incubateur.net; font-src 'self' https://client.crisp.chat; img-src 'self' data: https://image.crisp.chat https://client.crisp.chat https://storage.crisp.chat; script-src 'self' https://client.crisp.chat https://settings.crisp.chat https://stats.beta.gouv.fr/ https://sentry.incubateur.net 'nonce-KavHA0RVU9HlNOTJgNTn+g=='; style-src 'self' https://client.crisp.chat 'unsafe-inline'; report-uri https://sentry.incubateur.net; report-to 'csp-endpoint'
